effects: mechanistic literature alkaloid-related psychoactive potential and plant defense roles
interactions: Potential additive effects with serotonergic or other psychoactive substances.
safetyNotes: Ergoline-associated exposure can be unpredictable and may carry significant neuropsychiatric risk.
description: Ipomoea tricolor (morning glory) is discussed in ethnobotanical and plant-symbiosis literature, including ergoline-associated chemistry.
dosage: No validated therapeutic dosage recommendation is supported by promoted sources.
preparation: Historical ritual contexts involve seed use; modern self-experimentation is not supported by safety evidence.
region: Native to Mesoamerica and cultivated widely as an ornamental species.
traditionalUse: Historical Mesoamerican ritual use is described in ethnobotanical records and should be treated as traditional-use context.
